name: ai.relaystation/relaystation
title: Relaystation
description: Pay-per-call agent infrastructure: file storage & handoff, compute tools, messaging, e-sign, KYC.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.auth: OAuth 2.1 connector, rs_live_* API key (?key= fallback), or x402 per-call payment (no account)
io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.payment: x402 v2 (EIP-3009 USDC/EURC on Base) or prepaid balance; pay-per-call, no subscription
